MUST: RegisterTutorView MUST usar LoginRequiredMixin redirect si usuario ya autenticado (RNF-002)
RegisterTutorView.form_valid() MUST extraer country_code desde request.geo_data como contexto HTTP — no como business logic (RF-002-B)
RegisterTutorView.form_valid() MUST delegar registro a accounts.services.register_tutor() (RNF-004)
RegisterClientView.form_valid() MUST delegar registro a accounts.services.register_client() (RNF-004)
Registration views MUST capturar country_code desde request.geo_data y pasarlo al service (RF-002-B)
MUST_NOT: Registration views MUST NOT contener lógica de creación de User inline (RNF-004)
Registration views MUST NOT contener transaction.atomic() directamente (RNF-004)

MUST: DashboardView MUST redirigir a tutor_dashboard o client_dashboard según user_type (RF-002-C)
TutorDashboardView MUST usar LoginRequiredMixin + UserPassesTestMixin: user_type=='tutor' (RNF-002)
ClientDashboardView MUST usar LoginRequiredMixin + UserPassesTestMixin: user_type=='client' (RNF-002)
TutorDashboardView MUST importar ClassSession dentro del método get_context_data() — MUST NOT importar a nivel de módulo para evitar circular imports (INT-004-R3)
ClientDashboardView MUST importar ClassSession dentro del método get_context_data() — MUST NOT importar a nivel de módulo (INT-004-R3)
MUST_NOT: TutorDashboardView MUST NOT ser accesible a usuarios con user_type='client' (RNF-002)
ClientDashboardView MUST NOT ser accesible a usuarios con user_type='tutor' (RNF-002)

MUST: TutorProfileView MUST usar LoginRequiredMixin + UserPassesTestMixin: user_type=='tutor' (RNF-002)
EditTutorProfileView.form_valid() MUST delegar a accounts.services.update_tutor_profile() (RNF-004)
EditTutorProfileView.form_valid() MUST unpack 3-tuple: success, result, error (RNF-004)
ManageTutorSubjectsView.form_valid() MUST delegar a accounts.services.manage_tutor_subjects() (RF-016)
ManageTutorSubjectsView.form_valid() MUST unpack 3-tuple: success, result, error (RNF-004)
ManageTutorSubjectsView MUST inject 'subjects_by_area' context: dict of {KnowledgeArea.name: [Subject]} for template grouping (RF-020)
ManageTutorSubjectsView.get_context_data() MUST build subjects_by_area from Subject.objects.select_related('knowledge_area').order_by('knowledge_area__name', 'name') (RF-020)
MUST_NOT: Profile views MUST NOT ser accesibles a usuarios con user_type='client' (RNF-002)
Profile views MUST NOT contener lógica ORM inline de actualización (RNF-004)
ManageTutorSubjectsView MUST NOT inject flat subject list when grouped context is required (RF-020)

MUST: ClientProfileView MUST usar LoginRequiredMixin + UserPassesTestMixin: user_type=='client' (RNF-002)
EditClientProfileView.form_valid() MUST delegar a accounts.services.update_client_profile() (RNF-004)
EditClientProfileView.form_valid() MUST unpack 3-tuple: success, result, error (RNF-004)
MUST_NOT: Client profile views MUST NOT ser accesibles a usuarios con user_type='tutor' (RNF-002)
Client profile views MUST NOT contener lógica ORM inline (RNF-004)

MUST: StudentLoginView MUST return generic error when credentials belong to user_type='tutor' — MUST NOT redirect to TutorLoginView (RNF-014)
TutorLoginView MUST return generic error when credentials belong to user_type='client' — MUST NOT redirect to StudentLoginView (RNF-014)
Error message MUST be generic: 'Credenciales incorrectas' — MUST NOT reveal user_type mismatch (RF-002-D)
Login views MUST redirect to appropriate dashboard after successful auth per user_type (RF-002-C)
Superuser login MUST redirect to /gestion-ss-2026/ (RF-002-C)
Base template navbar logo MUST redirect authenticated users to their dashboard — MUST NOT redirect to registration page (BUG-015, RNF-015)
MUST_NOT: Login views MUST NOT redirect to alternate login URL on user_type mismatch — reveals email existence in system (RNF-014)
Login views MUST NOT expose whether email or password was the failing credential (RF-002-D)
Login views MUST NOT reveal that an email exists in the system through any response mechanism (RNF-014)
Base template MUST NOT link logo to registration URL when user is authenticated (BUG-015)
